HIOS / ChangeInfoIos import — 100% payload
==========================================
Source deb : C:\Users\Pem\Downloads\ChangeInfoIos-v3_4.2.6_iphoneos-arm64.deb
DEB size   : 218752
DEB SHA256 : 7d52c33f987e14b71e608f905b52ac9b414ea4b2743e444d14c65872163f4799
Imported   : full data + control + ar members

Debian control:
Package: com.changeinfoios.v3
Name: HIOS Faker v3
Version: 4.2.6
Architecture: iphoneos-arm64
Description: ChangeInfoIos v3 — focused device-spoof for popular iOS apps. Zero injection into target apps; central spoof in MobileGestaltHelper + CoreTelephony daemons.
Maintainer: ChangeInfoIos
Author: ChangeInfoIos
Section: Tweaks
Depends: ellekit | mobilesubstrate, firmware (>= 15.0)
Replaces: com.changeinfoios.tweak, com.changeinfoios.app, com.changeinfoios, com.changeinfoios.bundle, com.changeinfoios.safari, com.changeinfoios.location, com.changeinfoios.zalo
Conflicts: com.changeinfoios.tweak, com.changeinfoios.bundle
Provides: com.changeinfoios.tweak


Layout:
  DEBIAN/           control scripts from deb
  dylibs/           ChangeInfoIos MG+CT (original bytes)
  etc/cdhashes      trustcache list
  app/HIOSFakerV3.app/  full UI app from HIOS
  root/             full extracted data tree
  ar/               debian-binary, control.tar.xz, data.tar.xz

Rebuild iPFaker package:
  python scripts/build_sileo_deb.py --version 2.17.0
  python scripts/verify_hios_deb.py
